variant.label: v5 固定底座回补
variant.note: 以 v4 为基础，提高装备固定属性底座，降低对完美关键词条的依赖，观察能否改善最优配装和随机穿搭差距。

constraints: No character base stats, skill data, combat engine, or waterline teams are modified.
Equipment bonuses are applied only to cloned team specs before simulateTeams.
This is a proxy combat mapping for validation, not the final equipment combat formula.
